shape_meaning: code cmp,vp,vpc,naive = L,W,L,L : ONLY value_profile resolves; cmplog, value_profile_cmplog, and naive all block. => vp-PRO (CMP_MAP gradient necessary AND sufficient where I2S alone is not) AND vpc-anti (adding the I2S CmpLog stage to VP regresses it).
label_source: Layer-1 resolve pattern (vp resolves, all others block). The measurement below is the INDEPENDENT verification (G2): it reads only what each fuzzer's SAVED SEEDS physically contain (size + structural tokens), never the vp-resolves / others-block pattern that defined the shape.
round0_outcome: REFUTED. Round-0's only decidable hypothesis was a VP value-DISTANCE climb scored by value_distance_reached (vp_min_distance << cmplog/naive). The arbiter ran it on the 5 branches -> 2 unmeasurable, 2 rule_not_met (harfbuzz 1, sqlite3 3). The scalar Hamming/magnitude closure signal did not separate VP's corpus from the blockers' for these dispersed_multibyte / structural-assembly gates. Value-distance is DEAD here. The vpc-anti half was already decidable:false.
pivot: Switch the load-bearing measurement from value_distance_reached (refuted, and on these gates the byte-alignment is forbidden anyway per data_realities) to the BUILT structural descriptor seed_set:struct_size_and_token_count (joint_necessity.analyze_pair). This is a GENUINELY DIFFERENT mechanism: not 'how close did the operands get' but 'does VP's resolving corpus physically CONTAIN more of the required structure (longer, more SQL/font tokens) than the blocking corpus'. The same pivot succeeded on sibling shape i2s_vp_LWW_.

hypotheses.label: value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient admits corpus members that physically CONTAIN more of the gate-required structure (longer / more SQL-relational / font-table tokens) than naive's blocking seeds, which stall as short degenerate fragments
hypotheses.collapse_rationale: The two ORIGINAL prior subtypes (harfbuzz GPOS structural-semantic-state climb; sqlite3 SQL-syntax/relational-expression assembly) and round-0's collapsed vp_gradient_distance_climb are ONE mechanism observed in two domains. Across all 5 members the cards say the SAME thing about what distinguishes the resolving from the blocking seeds: winners are STRUCTURED inputs that physically carry the required tokens (a valid SELECT with a bracketed '[...]' identifier or a '<='/'>=' relational expression; a font input deep enough to set the GPOS-attachment flag), while losers are SHORT MALFORMED FRAGMENTS ('; d T 1S', 'T 1; c BINARY', 'SELECT +LLLLLT', degenerate '2222...' / '&' runs). The discriminating quantity is therefore a STRUCTURAL one - seed size + token presence - identical in both domains; only the per-target token vocabulary differs (handled by params). No real-data measurement can tell 'GPOS structural state' apart from 'SQL syntax assembly' - both are 'VP's corpus is bigger / more tokenful than the blockers' - so they collapse to one hypothesis.

measurement.registry_tool_rationale: BUILT and a direct fit via joint_necessity.analyze_pair (the generic 2-arm structural comparison: --winner-fuzzer value_profile --loser-fuzzer naive). It reads the resolving (W) vs blocking (L) seed sets, computes median size + mean structural-token count per set, and emits size_lift (= vp_size/naive_size), tag_lift / token_lift (= vp_tags - naive_tags) plus armtag-prefixed vp_tags/vp_size/naive_tags/naive_size. This is exactly 'does VP's corpus contain more structure'. NOT value_distance_reached (refuted round-0; also byte-alignment is forbidden on dispersed_multibyte/structural gates per data_realities). NOT operand_enrichment (corpus_queue:byte_freq_ratio) - it is fixed-offset single-literal only and returns no_gate_signature on structural/dispersed gates. NOT the 3-arm joint analyze() path - that is the vpc-RESOLVES joint-assembly subtype; here vpc BLOCKS, so we use the 2-arm pair path with vp as winner.
measurement.pair_choice_rationale: Winner = value_profile (resolving, 1-10 seeds per branch). Loser = naive (blocking, 10-19 seeds per branch) - NOT cmplog: the DB has NO cmplog seeds for any branch in this shape (only naive + value_profile_cmplog block), and naive is the cleaner contrast (zero CMP feedback of any kind, the degenerate-fragment seeds the cards describe). The vp>naive pair is the first covers_pairs entry for every member.

5237.note: default sfnt/OT tags; the gate (GPOS.hh:151) needs a font deep enough to assemble GPOS attachment -> resolving seeds carry more table tags + are larger than naive's truncated blockers

sqlite3._token_vocab: SQL relational/structural tokens the cards name as the assembled structure

14163.note: bracketed-identifier assembly at dequote:31402 (quote=='[') -> resolving seed carries a '[...]' token; naive blockers are ';d T 1S'-style fragments with no '['

14452.note: OP_Le VDBE dispatch needs a relational expression -> resolving seed carries '<='/'>='/'=' operators; naive blockers are short garbage that never parse a comparison opcode

14518.note: TK_LE parser arm needs a relational comparison operator between numeric operands; naive blockers ('SELECT +LLLLLT', 'SELECT +:SELECT') resolve down TK_ID/TK_VARIABLE arms

14577.note: rare true branch wants OPERATOR DIVERSITY (=,>=,<=,-,/); naive blockers are concentrated digit/operator runs ('2222...','&')

hypotheses.prediction: G1: value_profile's RESOLVING seed set is structurally RICHER than naive's BLOCKING seed set - it is longer AND/OR carries more of the gate-required structural tokens (size_lift >= 1.3 OR tag_lift >= 1.0). This is DISCRIMINATING: if VP's win were NOT a structural-assembly admission advantage (e.g. it resolved by a single lucky byte flip, or by edge coverage alone, or by an I2S literal substitution that naive could equally stumble into), VP's saved corpus would be NO bigger and carry NO more tokens than naive's blocking corpus - the structural metrics would not separate. An I2S/luck/edge mechanism predicts size_lift ~ 1 and tag_lift ~ 0. It can come out the other way: if naive's blockers are equally long / equally tokenful, the rule fails and the structural-assembly story is refuted.
hypotheses.refuted_if: size_lift < 1.3 AND tag_lift < 1.0 (VP's resolving corpus is neither longer nor more tokenful than naive's blocking corpus => no structural-assembly admission advantage; the VP-PRO label gets no independent structural confirmation and the branch falls to fallback inconclusive).

hypotheses.label: adding the I2S CmpLog stage to value_profile (=vpc) diverts mutation energy / dilutes the corpus and so REGRESSES the same gradient climb (vpc-anti half of the shape)
hypotheses.undecidable_rationale: The vpc-anti half (vpc loses despite carrying the SAME VP CMP_MAP feedback) is attributed in every card to corpus-scale / per-exec-budget effects ('the added I2S CmpLog stage and per-execution CMP buffering dilutes its corpus and per-exec budget' / 'diverts mutation effort away from the gradient' / 'vpc's I2S stage regresses'). This is NOT discriminable with real campaign data: (a) I2S is UNTAGGED in mutation_op (data_realities) so there is no per-fuzzer 'I2S diverted energy' event to count; (b) VP is a feedback, invisible in mutation_op. A STRUCTURAL comparison of vp-resolving vs vpc-blocking seeds (joint_necessity could run it - vpc has 10-20 blocking seeds per branch) would NOT discriminate the overhead story: an energy/budget-diversion mechanism does NOT predict that vpc's blocking seeds are structurally smaller than vp's resolving seeds (vpc could accumulate plenty of structure and still fail to cross the gate within budget), and any size gap is confounded with ordinary corpus-scale run-to-run variance the data cannot attribute. We record the hypothesis honestly but mark it decidable:false; it does not gate the shape's verdict.

hypotheses.label: value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient climbs a comparison-operand distance ramp toward a structural/syntactic gate state that cmplog- and naive-blocking seeds never approach
hypotheses.collapse_rationale: The two prior subtypes (harfbuzz GPOS structural-semantic-state climb; sqlite3 SQL-syntax/relational-expression assembly) are ONE mechanism observed in two domains: VP preserves inputs whose intercepted CMP operands move incrementally closer to the values guarding a deep gate (a GPOS-attachment scratch flag behind many tag/integer CMPs; a bracketed-identifier or relational-operator token behind parser/VDBE CMPs). In BOTH, the discriminating quantity is the same: how close a seed set's CMP operands get to satisfying the gate. No real-data measurement can tell 'structural state' apart from 'syntax assembly' — both are a CMP-operand-distance climb — so they collapse to one hypothesis. The token vocabulary differs per target (handled by params), the measurement does not.

measurement.registry_tool_rationale: No existing tool fits. operand_enrichment (corpus_queue:byte_freq_ratio) is for FIXED-OFFSET single-value literal gates and returns no_gate_signature on these dispersed_multibyte / structural gates (data_realities: byte-alignment fails on different-sized assembly seeds). joint_necessity (seed_set:struct_size_and_token_count) is for the vpc-NEEDS-BOTH joint-assembly subtype where vpc RESOLVES; here vpc BLOCKS, so this is not a joint gate. A NEW descriptor is required.
measurement.proposed_descriptor_spec: For the branch's gate (file:line in the card), instrument the gate-guarding CMPs and replay each seed set through FUZZ_BIN: for every intercepted CMP on the path to the blocker, record the operand-pair distance (min over the two normalizations the CMP_MAP buckets: Hamming over equal-width operands, and absolute integer difference) to a match, then take the per-seed-set minimum reached distance (closest approach) and the fraction of gate CMPs at distance 0 (satisfied). Emit per fuzzer's RESOLVING/BLOCKING seed set. Corpora exist for harfbuzz + sqlite3 (data_realities) — both targets in this shape are covered.

harfbuzz.gate_cmps: tag/integer comparisons guarding GPOS table parse -> HB_BUFFER_SCRATCH_FLAG_HAS_GPOS_ATTACHMENT at GPOS.hh:151

sqlite3.gate_cmps: byte/keyword/operator comparisons assembling bracketed-identifier or relational-operator tokens at sqlite3.c dequote/parser/VDBE lines 31402,87188,98662,103533

hypotheses.prediction: G1: value_profile's resolving seed set reaches a STRICTLY CLOSER minimum CMP-operand distance to the gate than BOTH cmplog's and naive's blocking seed sets (vp_min_distance < cmplog_min_distance AND vp_min_distance < naive_min_distance), and satisfies a larger fraction of gate CMPs (vp_gate_cmp_satisfied_frac > naive_gate_cmp_satisfied_frac). This is discriminating: if the win were NOT a gradient climb (e.g. a single I2S literal substitution, or pure luck/edge-coverage), the blocking seeds would be just as close on average and the closest-approach distances would NOT separate by fuzzer — an I2S/naive mechanism predicts no monotone VP-toward-gate distance advantage. It can come out the other way (blocking seeds equally close => refutes vp-gradient).
hypotheses.rule: vp_min_distance < cmplog_min_distance AND vp_min_distance < naive_min_distance AND vp_gate_cmp_satisfied_frac >= naive_gate_cmp_satisfied_frac + 0.2
hypotheses.refuted_if: vp_min_distance >= min(cmplog_min_distance, naive_min_distance) (VP's corpus is no closer to the gate than the blockers' => no gradient climb), OR the satisfied-fraction gap < 0.2.
hypotheses.note_restored: round-0 validated >=1 branch; restored for loop monotonicity

notes: ROUND-2 PIVOT after round-0 refutation. DROPPED priors: vp_gradient_distance_climb (round-0, via value_distance_reached) - scored against real seeds and refuted on all 5 branches (2 unmeasurable, 2 rule_not_met); its underlying value-DISTANCE-closure signal does not separate VP's corpus from the blockers' on these dispersed_multibyte / structural gates, and byte-alignment on structural-assembly gates is forbidden per data_realities anyway. NEW (genuinely different) MECHANISM: vp_admits_structurally_richer_corpus - the VP advantage here is STRUCTURAL-ASSEMBLY / TOKEN-AVAILABILITY, measured by the BUILT descriptor seed_set:struct_size_and_token_count (joint_necessity.analyze_pair, winner=value_profile loser=naive). Every card contrasts VP's structured resolving seeds (valid SELECT with '[...]' or '<='/'>=', or a GPOS-deep font) against naive's short malformed fragments, so size_lift / tag_lift is the right discriminator and is INDEPENDENT of the resolve pattern (G2). COLLAPSED the 2 original domain subtypes (harfbuzz GPOS structural state + sqlite3 SQL syntax assembly) into this one hypothesis - the structural metric is identical, only the per-target token vocab differs (in params: font tags for harfbuzz; SQL relational/structural tokens for the 4 sqlite3 branches). PAIR = vp-vs-naive (NOT vs-cmplog: the DB holds NO cmplog seeds for any branch in this shape; only naive + value_profile_cmplog block). VPC-ANTI half remains decidable:false: I2S is untagged so there is no per-fuzzer energy/overhead measurement, and a structural vp-vs-vpc comparison cannot discriminate 'I2S overhead regressed VP' from corpus-scale variance (data_realities) - honest decidable:false, no 100%-chasing. SEED FEASIBILITY (db/blockers.sqlite): harfbuzz 5237 W(value_profile)=10 / L(naive)=10; sqlite3 14163 W=1/L=10, 14452 W=3/L=19, 14518 W=4/L=17, 14577 W=3/L=17 - all pass analyze_pair's len(W)>=1 AND len(L)>=3 gate, so the descriptor scores every branch (W=1 on 14163 is thin -> single-seed median, flagged but still ruleable). Both targets (harfbuzz, sqlite3) have on-disk corpora (data_realities), so no branch is decidable:false merely for being off-server. CAVEAT: tag_lift on the SQL tokens depends on the per-branch token list above being present as literal byte-substrings; if a relational token like '<=' is split across mutated bytes the count under-reads - the OR with size_lift (the assembly-extent proxy, which does not depend on token vocabulary) is the safety net. [round-1 reconcile: restored round-0 hypotheses ['vp_gradient_distance_climb'] for monotonicity]
